name: Andrew
oracleText:
When Andrew enters the battlefield, search your library for a creature card with mana value 2 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
Whenever another creature with power 2 or less enters the battlefield under your control, you gain 1 life.
flavorText: "He first findeth his own brother Simon." — John 1:41
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Saint Andrew" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: First-Called Brother

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.sourceNotes: This saint portrait gives Andrew a direct and readable classics depiction.
